root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# cat > extract_fen.py << 'PY'
> import struct, zlib, re, sys
> fname = 'chess_board.png'
> fen_candidates = []
> texts = []
> try:
>     with open(fname, 'rb') as f:
>         data = f.read()
>     if data[:8] != b'\x89PNG\r\n\x1a\n':
>         pass
>     pos = 8
>     while pos + 8 <= len(data):
>         length = struct.unpack('>I', data[pos:pos+4])[0]
>         ctype = data[pos+4:pos+8]
>         cdata = data[pos+8:pos+8+length]
>         pos += 8 + length + 4  # skip CRC too
>         try:
>             if ctype == b'tEXt':
>                 # keyword\x00text
>                 if b'\x00' in cdata:
>                     keyword, text = cdata.split(b'\x00', 1)
>                     texts.append((keyword.decode('latin-1', 'ignore'), text.decode('latin-1', 'ignore')))
>             elif ctype == b'zTXt':
>                 # keyword\x00compression_method(1) + compressed_text
>                 parts = cdata.split(b'\x00', 1)
>                 if len(parts) == 2 and len(parts[1]) >= 1:
>                     keyword = parts[0].decode('latin-1', 'ignore')
>                     comp_method = parts[1][0]
>                     comp_data = parts[1][1:]
>                     try:
>                         text = zlib.decompress(comp_data).decode('utf-8', 'ignore')
>                     except Exception:
>                         text = ''
>                     texts.append((keyword, text))
>             elif ctype == b'iTXt':
>                 # keyword\x00compression_flag(1)\x00compression_method(1) language_tag\x00 translated_keyword\x00 text
>                 # We'll parse loosely
>                 # Read keyword
>                 idx = cdata.find(b'\x00')
>                 if idx != -1:
>                     keyword = cdata[:idx].decode('latin-1', 'ignore')
>                     rest = cdata[idx+1:]
>                     if len(rest) >= 2:
>                         comp_flag = rest[0]
>                         comp_method = rest[1]
>                         rest2 = rest[2:]
>                         # language tag
>                         idx2 = rest2.find(b'\x00')
>                         if idx2 != -1:
>                             lang = rest2[:idx2]
>                             rest3 = rest2[idx2+1:]
>                             # translated keyword
>                             idx3 = rest3.find(b'\x00')
>                             if idx3 != -1:
>                                 trans = rest3[:idx3]
>                                 text_bytes = rest3[idx3+1:]
>                                 if comp_flag == 1:
>                                     try:
>                                         text = zlib.decompress(text_bytes).decode('utf-8', 'ignore')
>                                     except Exception:
>                                         text = ''
>                                 else:
>                                     text = text_bytes.decode('utf-8', 'ignore')
>                                 texts.append((keyword, text))
>         except Exception:
>             pass
>     # Also add any raw strings as a fallback
>     try:
>         import subprocess
>         raw = subprocess.check_output(['strings', fname], text=True, errors='ignore')
>         texts.append(('raw_strings', raw))
>     except Exception:
>         pass
>     # Search for FEN in any text blocks
>     fen_regexes = [
>         # full 6-field FEN
>         re.compile(r'((?:[PNBRQKpnbrqk1-8]+/){7}[PNBRQKpnbrqk1-8]+ [wb] [KQkq-]+ (?:[a-h][36]|-) \d+ \d+)'),
>         # allow 4-field FEN
>         re.compile(r'((?:[PNBRQKpnbrqk1-8]+/){7}[PNBRQKpnbrqk1-8]+ [wb] [KQkq-]+ (?:[a-h][36]|-))'),
>         # minimal side to move only
>         re.compile(r'((?:[PNBRQKpnbrqk1-8]+/){7}[PNBRQKpnbrqk1-8]+ [wb])')
>     ]
>     for kw, text in texts:
>         if kw.lower() == 'fen' and text.strip():
>             fen_candidates.append(text.strip())
>         for rx in fen_regexes:
>             for m in rx.finditer(text):
>                 fen_candidates.append(m.group(1).strip())
>     # Deduplicate while preserving order
>     seen = set()
>     fens = []
>     for fen in fen_candidates:
>         if fen not in seen:
>             seen.add(fen)
>             fens.append(fen)
>     if fens:
>         with open('fen.txt', 'w') as out:
>             for fen in fens:
>                 out.write(fen + '\n')
>         print('Found FEN(s):')
>         for fen in fens:
>             print(fen)
>     else:
>         print('No FEN found')
>         sys.exit(1)
> except FileNotFoundError:
>     print('File not found: chess_board.png')
>     sys.exit(1)
> PY

action_ref.content:
{
  "analysis": "The PNG has only IHDR, IDAT, IEND chunks and no embedded text or FEN. Stockfish is installed, but we lack a FEN to feed it. We need to visually inspect the board from the image to reconstruct the position. We can render the image in the terminal using a utility like chafa to see the board and manually transcribe the piece placement to a FEN. Then we can use Stockfish to compute the best move. If there are multiple mating moves (e.g., mate in 1), we can enumerate all legal moves via Stockfish's 'd' command and test each move using 'go mate 1 searchmoves <move>' to collect all that deliver mate, and write them to /app/move.txt.",
  "plan": "1) Install chafa to render the image in terminal.
2) Display the chess_board.png with chafa at a large size to make pieces discernible.
3) Manually reconstruct the FEN from the displayed board (we will interactively write it to a file using a here-doc).
4) Use Stockfish: set the position to the FEN and run 'd' to list legal moves; then iterate moves to collect all mate-in-1 moves using 'go mate 1 searchmoves'. If none, fall back to 'go depth 20' to get best move.
5) Write the move(s) to /app/move.txt, one per line, and print the file.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "apt-get install -y chafa
",
      "duration": 15.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "chafa --size 120x60 chess_board.png
",
      "duration": 1.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "echo '# Enter the FEN for the displayed position, white to move' && read -r FEN && printf "%s\n" "$FEN" > /app/fen.txt
",
      "duration": 1.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat /app/fen.txt
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 - << 'PY'
import subprocess, shlex, sys, time
from pathlib import Path
fen = Path('/app/fen.txt').read_text().strip()
if len(fen.split())==2:
    fen = f"{fen} - - 0 1"
elif len(fen.split())==4:
    fen = f"{fen} 0 1"
# Start stockfish
p = subprocess.Popen(['stockfish'], stdin=subprocess.PIPE, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, text=True, bufsize=1)
def send(cmd):
    p.stdin.write(cmd+'\n'); p.stdin.flush()
def readall(timeout=0.2):
    time.sleep(timeout)
    out = p.stdout.read1(1<<20)
    return out
send('uci')
readall()
send('isready')
readall()
send(f'position fen {fen}')
send('d')
out = readall(0.5)
# Parse legal moves line
legal = []
for line in out.splitlines():
    if line.lower().startswith('legal moves:'):
        moves_line = line.split(':',1)[1].strip()
        legal = moves_line.split()
        break
winning = []
if legal:
    for mv in legal:
        send(f'position fen {fen}')
        send(f'go mate 1 searchmoves {mv}')
        out2 = ''
        # read some output
        out2 += readall(0.5)
        if 'score mate 1' in out2:
            winning.append(mv)
if not winning:
    # get best move normally
    send(f'position fen {fen}')
    send('go depth 20')
    out3 = ''
    out3 += readall(2.0)
    best = None
    for line in out3.splitlines()[::-1]:
        if line.startswith('bestmove'):
            parts = line.split()
            if len(parts)>=2:
                best = parts[1]
            break
    moves = [best] if best else []
else:
    moves = winning
Path('/app/move.txt').write_text('\n'.join(m for m in moves if m)+'\n')
print('Moves written to /app/move.txt:', moves)
send('quit')
PY
",
      "duration": 3.0
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat /app/move.txt
",
      "duration": 0.1
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}

at /app/fen.txt
python3 - << 'PY'
import subprocess, shlex, sys, time
from pathlib import Path
fen = Path('/app/fen.txt').read_text().strip()
if len(fen.split())==2:
    fen = f"{fen} - - 0 1"
elif len(fen.split())==4:
    fen = f"{fen} 0 1"
# Start stockfish
p = subprocess.Popen(['stockfish'], stdin=subprocess.PIPE, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, text=True, bufsize=1)
def send(cmd):
    p.stdin.write(cmd+'\n'); p.stdin.flush()
def readall(timeout=0.2):
    time.sleep(timeout)
    out = p.stdout.read1(1<<20)
    return out
send('uci')
readall()
send('isready')
readall()
send(f'position fen {fen}')
send('d')
out = readall(0.5)
# Parse legal moves line
legal = []
for line in out.splitlines():
    if line.lower().startswith('legal moves:'):
        moves_line = line.split(':',1)[1].strip()
        legal = moves_line.split()
        break
winning = []
if legal:
    for mv in legal:
        send(f'position fen {fen}')
        send(f'go mate 1 searchmoves {mv}')
        out2 = ''
        # read some output
        out2 += readall(0.5)
        if 'score mate 1' in out2:
            winning.append(mv)
if not winning:
    # get best move normally
    send(f'position fen {fen}')
    send('go depth 20')
    out3 = ''
    out3 += readall(2.0)
    best = None
    for line in out3.splitlines()[::-1]:
        if line.startswith('bestmove'):
            parts = line.split()
            if len(parts)>=2:
                best = parts[1]
            break
    moves = [best] if best else []
else:
    moves = winning
Path('/app/move.txt').write_text('\n'.join(m for m in moves if m)+'\n')
print('Moves written to /app/move.txt:', moves)
send('quit')
PY

from pathlib import Path
import subprocess
fen_path = Path('/app/fen.txt')

if fen_path.exists():
    fen = fen_path.read_text().strip()
    parts = fen.split()
    if len(parts)==2:
        fen = f"{parts[0]} {parts[1]} - - 0 1"
    elif len(parts)==4:
        fen = f"{parts[0]} {parts[1]} {parts[2]} {parts[3]} 0 1"
p = subprocess.Popen(['stockfish'], stdin=subprocess.PIPE, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, text=True, bufsize=1)
def send(cmd):
    p.stdin.write(cmd+'\n'); p.stdin.flush()
def read_some(wait=0.3):
    time.sleep(wait)
    try:
        return p.stdout.read1(1<<20)
    except Exception:
        return ''
send('uci'); read_some()
send('isready'); read_some()
if fen:
    send(f'position fen {fen}')
else:
    send('position startpos')
send('d'); read_some()
send('go depth 20')
out = read_some(2.0)
best = None
for line in out.splitlines()[::-1]:
    if line.startswith('bestmove'):
        parts = line.split()
        if len(parts)>=2:
            best = parts[1]
        break
moves = []
if best:
    moves = [best]
Path('/app/move.txt').write_text('\n'.join(moves)+('\n' if moves else ''))
print('Wrote moves to /app/move.txt:', moves)
send('quit')
PY
